methods.Uri.Builder appendEncodedPath(String new: Appends the given segment to the path.
methods.Uri.Builder appendPath(String newSegment: Encodes the given segment and appends it to the path.
methods.Uri.Builder appendQueryParameter(String: Encodes the key and value and then appends the parameter to the query string.
methods.Uri build(): Constructs a Uri with the current attributes.
methods.Uri.Builder clearQuery(): Clears the the previously set query.
methods.Uri.Builder encodedOpaquePart(String opa: Sets the previously encoded opaque scheme-specific-part.
methods.Uri.Builder opaquePart(String opaquePart: Encodes and sets the given opaque scheme-specific-part.
methods.String toString(): Returns a string representation of the object.
